title: SYNTHIA P0 Complete - Master Context & Execution Plan
description: ## Status: P0 COMPLETE - Executing 5-Phase Plan. 43 files built in archonx-synthia/. HEAD at 93c5c77. Security gaps: kilo-code-secrets.json, master.env.txt not gitignored, orgo-agent has plaintext secrets. Plan: (1) Security lockdown, (2) Commit, (3) TM Branding, (4) Handoff Spec, (5) USM+BMAD+Darya+Global hardening.

title: Epic: King Mode 3D, PopeBot, and VisionClaw
BEAD-KM-001: Git sync + security lockdown
description: Pull origin/main (BEAD-101), gitignore secrets, commit all local untracked work, open PRs for feature branches, handle dependabot PR #7.

title: BEAD-KM-002: Saleor agentic commerce stack
description: Create services/saleor/ with GraphQL tools (product_search, checkout_flow, order_management, storefront_config) and saleor_agent.py. Set as default ecommerce template. Wire 4 knights as operators. Add database entry. Ref: https://docs.saleor.io

title: BEAD-KM-003: 4 Knights - Marcus Lemonis People/Process/Product/Gratitude
description: Assign knights to Lemonis departments: Blitz=People, Patch=Process, Dash=Product, Stitch=Gratitude/BENEVOLENCIA. Update agent configs + KingModeChessboard.tsx with visual pillar identities. Ref: marcuslemonis.com 3P framework.

title: BEAD-KM-004: BENEVOLENCIA social purpose company entity
description: Create ecosystem/benevolencia/ (README, BRAND.md, PROGRAMS.md, AGENT_CONFIG.md). Register BENEVOLENCIA(TM) in trademark registry. Assign Stitch Knight as operator. Social Purpose Company owned by THE PAULI EFFECT. Gratitude department.

title: BEAD-KM-005: Franken-Claw(TM) trademark + brand
description: Create services/franken-claw/ (README, BRAND.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CHANGELOG.md). Register Franken-Claw(TM) in trademark registry. Document as ArchonX fork of OpenClaw + IronClaw security derivative. Brand: our proprietary value-add gateway.

title: BEAD-KM-006: Heart and Soul files - all 64 agents
description: Create .agent-souls/white/ and .agent-souls/black/ directories. Write [agent].soul.md for all 32 chess pieces per crew (64 total). Each file: Identity, Purpose, Core Values, Capabilities, Iron Claw Security Constraints, King Mode Alignment, Gratitude Statement.

title: BEAD-KM-007: Context7 MCP - wire into all agents
description: Add context7 to mcp_settings.json (npx -y @upstash/context7-mcp). Inject context7 compliance directive into all agent system prompts. Add to AGENTS.md as mandatory rule. Add to agent-lightning bootstrap checklist. GitHub: github.com/upstash/context7

title: BEAD-KM-008: Blender MCP + Remotion skills
description: Install blender-mcp (pip/uvx). Add to mcp_settings.json. Create services/blender/. Create archonx/tools/remotion_render.py subprocess tool. Create archonx/skills/remotion_renderer.py. Scaffold visualization/remotion/ project. Blender: github.com/ahujasid/blender-mcp

title: BEAD-KM-009: Pauli Pope Bot activation + pawn training
description: Update SOUL.md with pawn training authority. Update archonx/core/agents.py to link all 32 pawns to PopeBot supervisor. Create paulis-pope-bot/training/ curriculum (6 modules). Update KingModeChessboard.tsx with PopeBot training beams + progress bar. Update orchestrator pawn routing through PopeBot.

title: BEAD-KM-010: Database entries for all new entities
description: Add records for: BENEVOLENCIA, Franken-Claw, 4 Knights x Lemonis departments, Saleor default stack, 64 soul file registry, Context7 MCP dependency, Blender MCP tool, Remotion skill, PopeBot pawn assignments. Update agentRegistry.ts.

title: BEAD-KM-011: Skills completion (9 stubs + upwork_scout fix)
description: Implement: web_scraping.py, file_organization.py, form_filling.py, content_writing.py, seo_optimization.py, lead_generation.py, invoice_management.py, customer_support.py, story_toolkit.py (new). Fix upwork_scout.py line 134 pass statement with Remotion tool call.

title: BEAD-KM-013: King Mode Gemini 3.1 handoff - final PRD delivery
description: Verify all BEAD-KM-001 through KM-012 complete. Confirm KING_MODE_GEMINI_31_PRD.md and MASTER_BUILD_PLAN.md are current. Package full context for Gemini 3.1 (newest model). KingModeChessboard.tsx + soul files + BENEVOLENCIA + Franken-Claw + Saleor + Context7 + Blender + PopeBot. Hand off with strict build prompt.

title: ConX Layer - Remote Machine Control Implementation
description: Implemented complete ConX Layer for remote machine control across ARCHON-X network. Includes Cloudflare Tunnel integration, MCP auto-wiring, Telegram bot control, and cross-platform onboarding scripts.

title: Cloudflare Tunnel Manager Module
description: Created archonx/conx/tunnel.py with full tunnel lifecycle management including install detection, creation, service installation, and health checks.

title: MCP Server Auto-Wiring
description: Created archonx/conx/mcp_wirer.py for automatic Claude Desktop config detection and MCP server wiring. Supports Windows, macOS, and Linux with idempotent operations.

title: Telegram Bot Control Interface
description: Implemented archonx/conx/telegram_bot.py with commands: /status, /deploy, /audit, /launch, /files, /run, /help. Includes safety confirmations and audit logging.

title: Machine Onboarding Wizard
description: Created archonx/conx/onboard.py with complete onboarding flow: OS detection, dependency installation, tunnel creation, MCP wiring, and machine registration.

title: Linux/Mac One-Liner Deployment
description: Created scripts/conx-onboard.sh - Bash script for automated onboarding on Linux and macOS systems. Single curl command to complete setup.

title: Windows PowerShell Deployment Script
description: Created scripts/conx-onboard.ps1 - PowerShell script for automated onboarding on Windows. Single iwr command to complete setup with winget integration.

title: Server API Routes
description: Added 5 FastAPI routes to archonx/server.py: GET /conx/status, POST /conx/register, DELETE /conx/register/{id}, GET /conx/machines, POST /conx/launch. Includes machine health checks and task routing.

title: Configuration Block
description: Updated archonx-config.json with complete ConX settings block including tunnel configuration, MCP auto-wiring defaults, and security options.

title: Protocol Documentation
description: Updated AGENTS.md with ConX Layer Protocol section (§7) including machine registration, onboarding instructions for all OS, and agent access rules.

title: Comprehensive Test Suite
description: Created tests/test_conx.py with 11+ test methods covering MCPWirer, Tunnel management, Onboarding, Server routes, and Telegram bot.

title: Dependency Updates
description: Updated pyproject.toml with ConX dependencies: python-telegram-bot>=20.0, qrcode[pil]>=7.4, psutil>=5.9.

title: CLI-Anything Integration Planning
description: NEXT PHASE: Integrate HKUDS/CLI-Anything to make ANY installed software controllable by agents. Will enable agents to control GIMP, Blender, LibreOffice, Audacity, OBS, and any custom enterprise software.

title: Create archonx/skills/cli_anything Module
description: Create new module for CLI-Anything integration with: generator.py, registry.py, executor.py, discovery.py. Will auto-discover installed apps and register as skills.

title: CLI-Anything + ConX Layer Integration
description: Wire CLI-Anything into ConX Layer to enable remote app control. Agents can route commands to specific machines: 'Run GIMP on laptop-01'.

title: Test CLI-Anything with GIMP, Blender, LibreOffice
description: End-to-end testing of CLI-Anything integration with real applications. Validate JSON command execution and output formatting.
